note: A quick frame for Aalto's interdisciplinary model.
summary: Aalto combines art, design, science, technology, and business.
title: Intro to Aalto University

cards.title: Art + technology
cards.body: Aalto combines creative, scientific, technical, and business disciplines.

cards.title: Otaniemi campus
cards.body: Its campus gathers students, researchers, companies, and public partners.

cards.title: Applied impact
cards.body: Learning connects innovation, sustainability, and entrepreneurship.

narration.script: Intro to Aalto University. Aalto combines art, design, science, technology, and business. Art + technology: Aalto combines creative, scientific, technical, and business disciplines. Otaniemi campus: Its campus gathers students, researchers, companies, and public partners.
